title: ElevenLabs Webhook Event
description: Represents a webhook event payload delivered by ElevenLabs to configured endpoints. Covers post-call transcriptions, audio recordings, call failures, and workspace events.

event_type.description: The type of webhook event being delivered.

PostCallTranscriptionEvent.description: Webhook event containing the full transcript of a completed Conversational AI conversation.

event_type.description: Event type identifier for post-call transcriptions.

conversation_id.description: Unique identifier for the completed conversation.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent that participated in the conversation.

transcript.description: Ordered list of conversation turns with speaker roles and timestamps.

PostCallAudioEvent.description: Webhook event containing the audio recording of a completed conversation, delivered via chunked transfer encoding.

event_type.description: Event type identifier for post-call audio.

conversation_id.description: Unique identifier for the completed conversation.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent that participated in the conversation.

audio_format.description: The format of the audio data.

CallInitiationFailureEvent.description: Webhook event sent when a Conversational AI call fails to initiate.

event_type.description: Event type identifier for call initiation failures.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent that failed to start a call.

error.description: Description of the error that prevented call initiation.

event_type.description: Event type identifier for workspace events.

TranscriptTurn.description: A single turn in a conversation transcript.

role.description: The speaker role in the conversation.

timestamp.description: Timestamp in seconds from the start of the conversation.

duration_seconds.description: Total duration of the conversation in seconds.
